Professional & Academic Journey

By João Brito • July 6, 2026

This page outlines my academic background and professional history within software engineering, database management, and cloud infrastructure.

Academic Foundation

I am currently pursuing my higher education at the Federal University of ABC (UFABC):

  • B.S. in Science & Technology (Expected completion: September 2025)
  • B.S. in Information Engineering

UFABC’s interdisciplinary model has provided me with a strong foundation in computer science principles, mathematical modeling, and engineering methodologies, which I apply directly to complex software architectural design.

Professional Journey

JPMorgan Chase

Software Engineer I | Full Stack Developer (November 2023 - Present)

  • Specializing in full-stack software development and cloud-native infrastructure within the financial services sector.
  • Responsible for building, deploying, and maintaining scalable backend applications and distributed APIs.
  • Utilizing Java, Spring Boot, and Python to build secure, reliable, and high-performant services.

Itaú Unibanco

Data Engineer & Infrastructure Analyst (November 2020 - August 2023)

  • Data Engineer (Feb 2022 - Aug 2023): Engineered automated data orchestration pipelines utilizing Python, SQL, and SSIS to manage cost-related financial reports. Architected robust, high-performance dimensional data models on SQL Server Analysis Services, drastically reducing ETL processing runtime. Implemented automated data ingestion scrapers using Selenium, Scrapy, and BeautifulSoup.
  • Infrastructure Analyst (Oct 2021 - Feb 2022): Orchestrated PMO activities, agile team modernization, and developed financial forecasting models using Python (pandas, scikit-learn) to mitigate risk and improve delivery timelines.
  • Corporate Intern (Nov 2020 - Oct 2021): Developed automation tools with Python and Pandas to analyze and simplify real estate data pipelines, creating interactive Power BI reporting dashboards for business controllers.

Technical Specialties & Certifications

Over the course of my career, I have focused on building competency in modern backend engineering, cloud platforms, and infrastructure-as-code:

  • Cloud & DevOps: AWS (S3, EC2, Cloud Practitioner), HashiCorp Terraform (Certified Associate), Ansible, RedHat Enterprise Linux, Shell Scripting.
  • Languages & Frameworks: Java (Spring Boot, JUnit, Mockito), Python (Flask, Pytest, Pandas, Scikit-learn), SQL, and NoSQL (MongoDB).
  • Paradigms: Distributed systems design, SOLID principles, RESTful/SOAP APIs, BDD (Behave/Cucumber), and automated testing.

Achievements & Competitions

  • Champion | Batalha de Dados Payments (Special 5-Year Edition)
  • Finalist | Batalha de Dados dos Campeões (2022 Edition)
